description: Asset-Backed Security (ABS) and Mortgage-Backed Security (MBS) tranche pricer. Generates monthly pool cash flows using a CPR or PSA prepayment model, applies CDR-based defaults with a recovery lag, then distributes cash flows to the tranche via a sequential waterfall where credit support absorbs losses first. Covers generic ABS (auto loans, credit cards, student loans), agency MBS (Fannie/Freddie/Ginnie pass-throughs, no credit risk) and non-agency/private-label MBS.

required_fields.name: instrument_type
required_fields.description: Collateral and credit-risk structure of the instrument

required_fields.name: pool_wac
required_fields.description: Weighted average coupon of the underlying loan pool (decimal or %, auto-normalised)

required_fields.name: pool_wam
required_fields.description: Weighted average remaining maturity of the pool in months (integer)

required_fields.name: tranche_balance
required_fields.description: Outstanding notional of the tranche being priced

required_fields.name: tranche_coupon
required_fields.description: Pass-through / certificate rate of the tranche (decimal or %, auto-normalised)

required_fields.name: credit_spread_bp
required_fields.description: Z-spread over the benchmark discount curve in basis points

optional_fields.name: pool_seasoning
optional_fields.description: Months elapsed since pool origination. Used to position the prepayment ramp correctly for PSA pricing (default 0 = new issue)

optional_fields.name: cpr
optional_fields.description: Flat annualised CPR prepayment assumption (default 6%). Used when prepayment_model = cpr or as a base for ABS instrument types.

optional_fields.name: cdr
optional_fields.description: Annualised conditional default rate of the pool (default 0 for mbs_agency; 0.02 = 2% for abs and mbs_non_agency)

optional_fields.name: loss_severity
optional_fields.description: Loss given default as a fraction of defaulted balance (default 0.40 = 40% LGD). Recovery = 1 − loss_severity, received after recovery_lag_months.

optional_fields.name: prepayment_model
optional_fields.description: Prepayment model to use. psa applies the Public Securities Association CPR ramp (standard for US MBS). cpr uses a flat CPR assumption (standard for ABS).

optional_fields.name: psa_speed
optional_fields.description: PSA speed as a percentage (100 = 100 PSA = standard ramp to 6% CPR at month 30). Only used when prepayment_model = psa.

optional_fields.name: credit_support_pct
optional_fields.description: Total subordination below this tranche as a percentage of pool balance (equity + junior tranches). Absorbs losses before they reach this tranche.

optional_fields.name: senior_notes_balance
optional_fields.description: Aggregate outstanding balance of tranches senior to this one. Senior tranches receive all pool principal first in the sequential waterfall before this tranche is paid. Set to 0 if this is the most senior rated tranche.

optional_fields.name: recovery_lag_months
optional_fields.description: Months between the default event and receipt of recoveries from the collateral (default 6)

optional_fields.name: calendar
optional_fields.description: Business day calendar (default UnitedStates for US ABS/MBS)

optional_fields.name: currency
optional_fields.description: Settlement currency (e.g. USD, EUR) — used for benchmark discount curve selection
